name: Socket
description: Socket MCP server for dependency security checks
long_description:
__Secure your code by default.__
The Socket MCP server brings real-time dependency security checks directly into MCP-capable AI tools. Audit packages from npm, PyPI, Cargo, and more with rich verdicts (PASS/WARN/FAIL), category scores, and alert context.

Tools included:
 - check_package (single package verdict + alerts)
 - batch_check (multiple packages verdicts + alerts)
 - explain_alert (plain-language explanation of alert types)
 - depscore (deprecated alias for batch_check)

tools.name: check_package
tools.description: Check a single package with a PASS/WARN/FAIL verdict, scores, and alerts.

tools.name: batch_check
tools.description: Check multiple packages at once with verdicts, scores, alerts, and a summary.

tools.name: explain_alert
tools.description: Explain a Socket alert type in plain language (static knowledge base, no API call).

tools.name: depscore
tools.description: Deprecated: alias for batch_check (kept for backward compatibility).

SOCKET_API_KEY.title: Socket API key
SOCKET_API_KEY.description: API key for interacting with the Socket API
